meaning: adj.奇形怪状的,奇异n.奇形怪状的人(或物、图案等),奇异风格
examples: It's grotesque to expect a person of her experience to work for so little money.
Two stone lions of grotesque shape guard the entrance.
The two stone lions, of grotesque shape, guard the entrance.
But for now your grotesque and fabulous burlesque show is a full-on mainstream commodity.
The Jack Abramoff lobbying scandal is grotesque, but it is not unprecedented in Washington history.
